Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: visual works by subject type [300191098], visual works (works) [300191086], Visual Works (hierarchy name) [300179869], Visual and Verbal Communication (hierarchy name) [300264552], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Pictorial representations, which may be in various media, having as subject matter scenes or events from everyday life, familiar objects, or ordinary custom or incident that do not belong to any other class of painting such as history, portrait, animal, landscape, marine, fruit and flower, or still life, but which may incidentally exhibit elements of any of those.

Source.Source_ID: 2000109248/Wornum, Descriptive and Historical Catalogue of the Pictures in the National Gallery (1863)

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Úsese para representaciones pictóricas que pueden ser realizadas en varios medios, que representan escenas o eventos de la vida diaria; generalmente usado con otro término como "pintura" o "estampa".
Meestal geschilderde voorstellingen die situaties of gebeurtenissen uit het leven van alledag verbeelden.
可能是以不同媒材繪製而成的圖畫再現，呈現日常生活的場景或事件；通常和另一個詞彙，如「繪畫」或「版畫」一併使用。

Bildliche Darstellung, die eine Szene oder ein Ereignis aus dem täglichen Leben wiedergibt und in allen Medien vorkommen kann; gewöhnlich mit anderen Begriffen, wie "Gemälde" oder "Druck", zusammen verwendet.

Representações pictóricas, que podem estar em vários meios, tendo como tema cenas ou eventos da vida cotidiana, objetos familiares ou costumes ou incidentes comuns que não pertencem a nenhuma outra classe de pintura, como história, retrato, animal, paisagem, marinha , frutas e flores, ou natureza morta, mas que podem, incidentalmente, exibir elementos de qualquer um deles.

Source.Source_ID: 2000017031/Zinkham and Parker, Descriptive Terms for Graphic Materials (1986)

Term_Source.Page: Genre (Art) -- but having different meaning, heading is "art genres" sh 85053925

Source.Source_ID: 2000046691/Lucie-Smith, Thames & Hudson Dictionary of Art Terms (1986)
2000051258/Sturgis y Clayson, Entender la pintura. Análisis y explicación de los temas de las obras (2002)
2000048873/Dewey, Sistema de Clasificación Decimal Dewey e Índice Relativo (2000)
2000093495/大英百科全書線上繁體中文版
